name: 1'4"x2'4" Rectangle Outdoor Door Mat Charlcie Flower - Room Essentials™
description:
Add decorative style to your entrance with this Rectangle Outdoor Door Mat from Room Essentials™. This rectangular outdoor doormat is adorned with a vibrant Charlcie floral pattern in white, red, blue and green against a brown backdrop for a bright, welcoming look. Made with 100% coir and a latex backing, it has a medium pile that helps capture dirt and debris at your doorstep and is easy to shake clean when needed. Measuring 28 inches long by 16 inches wide, this mat works well at your front door, back door or patio entrance.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
